headline: AMD announced its financial results and forward-looking guidance for the fiscal quarter and full year ended December 27, 2025.
investor_impact: This earnings release provides critical updates on Q4 and FY2025 performance, as well as forward-looking guidance. Analysts will heavily scrutinize the non-GAAP financial measures and presentation materials to assess AMD's growth trajectory, particularly in data center and AI segments, directly impacting valuation models.
